stemHtml: The crew of a large jet aircraft is performing the checklist when they get interrupted. As a result, the slats are not set for take-off, which means that the configuration is NOT suitable for a safe take-off. This should cause the take-off warning system to give, as a minimum…

options.a: An audible alert in the initial part of the take-off run.
options.b: A visible alert in the initial part of the take-off run.
options.c: An audible alert at or above V1 in the take-off run.
options.d: A visible alert at or above V1 in the take-off run.
